svg.title: ChatApp real system architecture
svg.desc: Accurate architecture diagram read directly from backend source code

g.text: Socket.IO client · VideoSDK React SDK · Port 3000 / 5173

svg.text: Auth: JWT signed with SECRET_KEY · 7-day expiry · All 3 services validate token via isAuth middleware
User service uses MongoDB + Redis + RabbitMQ · Chat & Call use MongoDB only
Internal HTTP (chat service → user service via httpx)
